log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
--- Siren — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Siren — Bardic Musician.
→ Siren — Bardic Musician: CON save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 20] FAIL! 40 necrotic damage. HP: 27/67
--- Siren — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:17+9=26 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Siren — Bardic Musician.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:3+12=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 fire damage. Siren — Bardic Musician HP: 16/67
--- Siren — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Siren — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Siren — Bardic Musician.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:19+12=31 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 fire damage. Siren — Bardic Musician HP: 5/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
--- Siren — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:12+9=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Siren — Bardic Musician.
→ Siren — Bardic Musician healed for 6 HP. HP: 11/67
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Siren — Bardic Musician.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:15+12=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 fire damage. Siren — Bardic Musician HP: -5/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 5 rounds ===
